---
title: "Pigeon Pie, The By the author of “The Heir of Redclyffe.”"
---

## Pigeon Pie, The By the author of “The Heir of Redclyffe.”

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1860
**Genre:** Fiction (historical)
**Format:** Book

**Publisher:** John and Charles Mozley, 6, Paternoster Row, London. Masters and Co., 78, New Bond Street, London.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
